demote     Demote one or multiple releases
promote    Promote a snap to next release channel. E.g.: test -> staging ->
production
pack       Publish a new release
sha256     Calculate SHA-256 checksum for a given file
rcedit     Manipulate resources for either Windows or Linux binaries
list       (Default Verb) Show current releases
restore    Restore missing or corrupt packages
lock       Lock management
help       Display more information on a specific command.
version    Display version information.
